top_signals.title: FakeGit campaign uses 7,600 GitHub repos to push SmartLoader malware
top_signals.summary: A large-scale operation dubbed 'FakeGit' is pushing SmartLoader and StealC malware through 7,600 malicious GitHub repositories that accumulated more than 14 million downloads. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Samsung in talks to invest in Mistral at €20bn valuation
top_signals.summary: South Korean giant could invest as much as €1bn in French AI group seeking to be a leading alternative to US tech
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Crypto lobby group Digital Chamber sues Illinois to block digital asset tax
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: European Pillar of Social Rights: a renewed commitment to protect and empower EU's citizens
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 22 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission adopted a Communication on the European Pillar of Social Rights. It confirms that the Pillar remains the EU's social shield and compass for fairness in an age of fast transformation, for a Europe that protects and empowers citizens.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Factsheet: A renewed commitment to a future-ready Social Europe
top_signals.summary: European Commission Factsheet Brussels, 22 Jul 2026   Factsheet: A renewed commitment to a future-ready Social Europe Factsheet: A renewed commitment to a future-ready Social Europe
